title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
author: openai-blog
raw_description: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.
summary: OpenAI通过Appia Foundation推动高级AI共享标准，支持评估框架、安全实践和全球合作。
analysis_note: 聚焦标准制定，有行业影响力，但技术细节不足，评分中等偏上。
